signInDescription: Enter your email below to login to your account
signUpDescription: Enter your email below to create your account
colorFormatWarning: The color should be in hex
deleteReminder: Are you sure to delete the following record?
wrongDateRange: The end date should not be before the start date
forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link
resetLinkSent: If that email is registered, a reset link has been sent
invalidOrExpiredToken: Invalid or expired password reset link
verifyEmailDescription: We sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to activate your account.
verifyEmailSuccess: Email verified! You are now logged in.
emailChangeOtpDescription: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to confirm your new email address.
emailChangeOtpResent: A new code has been sent
downloadMyDataDescription: Download a copy of your account, visa settings, and leave records as a JSON file.
downloadMyDataError: Could not export your data. Please try again later.
deleteAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account, visa settings, and leave records. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccountConfirmation: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone. Enter your password to confirm.
remarksPrivacyNotice: Avoid including sensitive personal details (e.g. health or family information).
termsIntro: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of Visa Calculator (the "Service"). By creating an account or otherwise using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
termsSection1Body: Visa Calculator is a personal tool that helps you track visa dates and leave records, and estimate key immigration milestones (such as indefinite leave to remain and citizenship eligibility dates) based on the information you provide. The Service is provided for informational and organisational purposes only and does not constitute legal, immigration, or professional advice. You should independently verify all dates and requirements with the relevant government authority or a qualified immigration adviser before relying on them.
termsSection2Body: You must provide a valid email address and keep your password secure to create an account. You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account. Notify us promptly if you believe your account has been compromised.
termsSection3Body: You may enter personal information into the Service, including free-text remarks on your leave records. Please avoid including sensitive personal details (such as health or family information) that are not necessary for tracking your leave. You remain responsible for the accuracy and appropriateness of any content you submit.
termsSection4Body: You agree not to misuse the Service, including by attempting to gain unauthorised access to other users' data, interfering with the Service's operation, or using the Service for any unlawful purpose.
termsSection5Body: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including as to accuracy, reliability, or fitness for a particular purpose. Visa and immigration rules change frequently; we make no guarantee that calculated dates remain accurate or up to date.
termsSection6Body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of, or inability to use, the Service, including any immigration, visa, or legal consequences resulting from reliance on information calculated by the Service.
termsSection7Body: You may stop using the Service at any time. You can permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time from your account settings; this action cannot be undone. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
termsSection8Body: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the Service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
termsSection9Body: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact the project maintainer.
